purpose: Prototype explainable ranking inputs without using proprietary review scores.

criteria.source: manual seed curation from official/route-specialist pages
manual seed tags plus route naming
manual seed tags; later derive from hydrography/viewshed
manual logistics notes plus OSM POIs
manual source notes; later derive from parking, permits, and popularity proxies

non_goals: Do not ingest proprietary ratings or reviews without explicit permission.
Do not present sample scores as objective safety or navigation guidance.
